name: Blackstone 36 Inch Outdoor Flat Top Gas Griddle Station
whatWorks: The 720 square inch cold-rolled steel cooking surface is the star of this griddle. Once properly seasoned, it develops a non-stick patina that outperforms most dedicated non-stick pans, and the flat surface lets you cook everything from smash burgers and bacon to stir fry and eggs simultaneously across four independent heat zones.

Four independently controlled H-shaped burners give you tremendous flexibility. You can run a screaming-hot sear zone on one side while keeping pancakes warm on the other — a level of temperature zoning that traditional grill grates simply cannot match.

The 60,000 BTU output heats up fast and recovers quickly after you load cold food. Most users report the surface reaching cooking temperature in under 10 minutes, and the heat distribution across the full surface is remarkably even compared to round burner designs.

Folding legs and the relatively compact footprint make this practical to move and store even in a smaller backyard. Setup is straightforward with no tools required beyond the initial assembly, and the push-and-turn electronic ignition is reliable and easy to use.
worthKnowing: Cold-rolled steel requires seasoning before first use and ongoing maintenance to prevent rust — especially in Canadian climates with humidity swings. Budget for a dedicated Blackstone griddle cover, and dry the surface and apply a thin oil coat after every cook. This is a commitment compared to a standard grill.

The rear grease management channel drains to a small cup on the back-right corner. It works, but the cup is small and can overflow during heavy bacon or fatty meat sessions. Many owners upgrade to a drip bucket attachment or simply check it frequently during long cooks.

There is no lid on this model, which means you cannot trap heat for melting cheese or cooking thicker items through indirect heat. If you want a lid, you'll need to buy an aftermarket option or step up to the Blackstone model that includes one.

Propane tank is not included, and at 60,000 BTU you will burn through a standard 20 lb tank faster than a typical gas grill. Canadian winters also mean propane pressure can drop in very cold weather, affecting performance. Keep a spare tank on hand for long cook sessions.

commonComplaints.title: Rust appears quickly without proper care
commonComplaints.body: Multiple buyers report surface rust forming within weeks if the griddle is left uncovered or not oiled after cooking. Cold-rolled steel demands consistent maintenance that some buyers don't expect from an outdoor appliance.

commonComplaints.title: Grease cup overflows easily
commonComplaints.body: The rear grease management cup is small relative to the cooking surface area. During high-fat cooks like bacon for a crowd, it can overflow and create a mess or a flare-up hazard underneath.

commonComplaints.title: Wind affects cooking temperature significantly
commonComplaints.body: Without a lid or windscreen, breezy days noticeably reduce surface temperature and create uneven hot and cold zones. Several Reddit users recommend buying a windscreen accessory if you cook in an exposed area.

commonComplaints.title: Legs can be wobbly on uneven ground
commonComplaints.body: The folding leg design, while convenient for storage, does not level on anything other than a flat hard surface. On a deck with minor slope or patio pavers, the griddle can rock noticeably.

verdict: The Blackstone 36-inch is the go-to flat top griddle for outdoor cooking enthusiasts who want massive versatility and cooking capacity at a fair price. It excels at high-volume breakfast cooks, smash burgers, and anything that benefits from a flat surface — things a traditional grill simply cannot do. The steel surface maintenance is non-negotiable, so buyers who want a set-it-and-forget-it appliance should look elsewhere. For those willing to season and care for it, this griddle becomes the most-used piece of outdoor cooking equipment in the backyard.

realBuyers.quote: I've cooked on this every weekend since I bought it. Smash burgers come out better than any restaurant I've been to, and cleanup is honestly faster than my old gas grill.
Sunday morning pancakes and bacon for six people at the same time — this thing is a game changer. The even heat across the whole surface is impressive.
Worth every penny. I seasoned it properly from day one and have had zero rust issues. Just keep it covered and oiled.
The four zones let me run steak on screaming hot and veggies on medium at the same time. Nothing else I've cooked on can do that.

metaDescription: Blackstone 36 Inch Flat Top Griddle review — 720 sq in, 60,000 BTU, 4 zones. Is it worth $449 CAD on Amazon.ca?
introText: The Blackstone 36 Inch Outdoor Flat Top Gas Griddle (ASIN: B01E6V5S44) is the best-selling flat top griddle on Amazon.ca, priced at $449 CAD. With 720 square inches of cold-rolled steel cooking surface and four independently controlled burners, it's built for cooks who want to do more than grill.
